title: Dungeons, animations and optimization!
description: based on fantasy medieval adds, more biomes, dragons, structures, and more animations but with good optimization!
body:
!IMPORTANT NOTICE!
all the resource packs are additional and not needed except these:
- quadral 
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Animations: Player Extension
- Fresh Animations: Extensions
- Fresh Animations: Spiders
- Fresh Animations: Creepers
- Glowing 3D Armor
- Fresh Buckets
- Fresh Flower Pots
- Music and Melody
- [HMI] Gous's Hand Poses

This modpack souly is focused on medival fantasy but you can use it as a better vanila modpack but with good fps


this modpack adds:

structures🏰

biomes🌳

dungeons🧟‍♂️

more mobs💀

better optimization✨

more bosses🩻

dragons🐉

more blocks🪵

better caves🪨

friends💕

joining friends world's🤲

better textures🌏

better animations🏃‍♂️ 

more tools and armour🪖

better combat⚔️

better movement🤸‍♂️




The best medival fantasy modpack with dragons and more mobs, this modpack combinds FO for the best optimization even on laptop!



the animations are top tier! just look!!


![jumping!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12ae198affd42c64dc53bee9f22c25fdfd3d3ae7_0.webp)
![crouching](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a27c6c32dbd8ae6d41598bf8906114996b11a18_0.webp)
![swimming up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf0ab74104e3c920c90b3bdcd3989e9863ca1970_0.webp)


this also adds more mobs, wayy more structures and biomes! 



if you want to have more mobs, bosses, structures, biomes, textures, optimization and fps you have come to the right place



if you like the modpack better vannila but want better optimization, good textures, better animations all mixed in medival fantasy you've come to the right place!





dragons and how to tame them (credits to Dilophogamer 18 on youtube)



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dlAsspOlC0U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


movment tutorial for mod -ninja moves-



Crawl: sneak and look down near a hole. (easy)
Soft Landing: sneak and land on wheat, sands, wools, leaves or sponge to reduce falling damage. (easy)
Roll: jump from 4 blocks or more and sneak to make a roll on the ground and reduce falling damage. (easy)
Climb: sneak in air, looking at the direction of the block to climb. Shift right/left parallel. (medium)
Wall Jump: sprint and jump facing a wall to have a quick momentum for a second jump. (medium)
Wall Run: sprint parallel to a wall. (hard)
